name: @payloadcms/plugin-mcp
description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) capabilities with Payload
author: Payload <dev@payloadcms.com> (https://payloadcms.com)

scripts.build: pnpm copyfiles && pnpm build:types && pnpm build:swc

//deps_notes.@cfworker/json-schema: Should be able to remove in next @modelcontextprotocol/server alpha release. Marked as an optional peer of @modelcontextprotocol/server, but its bundle does an eager top-level `import { Validator } from '@cfworker/json-schema'`, so it must be installed even when only zod-registered tools are used. Drop once upstream lazy-loads the validator. See: https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/typescript-sdk
//deps_notes.zod: Internal use only — for the plugin's own tool/prompt schemas. Plugin consumers no longer pass zod schemas; they provide JSON Schema (`MCPInputSchema`) and may bring their own validator (zod 4: `z.toJSONSchema(...)`).
